name: Ghost Layer — Dual-Chain Toll Gateway + Execution Matrix
description: Neutral bridge between XRPL RLUSD and Base/EVM USDC (EIP-3009) + AI Decision Notary + Agent Credit Marketplace + 54-block on-chain Execution Matrix. Credit Marketplace: AI agents trade services peer-to-peer via zero-custody XRPL native escrow — Ghost Layer enforces credit tier gates and fires EscrowFinish/Cancel as condition fulfiller. Decision Notary mints any AI decision as an immutable URIToken on Xahau — three tiers: STANDARD (0.001 RLUSD), CERTIFIED (0.01 RLUSD, Ed25519 certificate), SOVEREIGN (0.05 RLUSD). All products loyalty-discounted: BRONZE 0% → DIAMOND 30%.

tools.name: ghost_layer_bridge
tools.description: Execute cross-chain bridge transaction synchronously. POST /v1/bridge/execute

tools.name: ghost_agent_loyalty
tools.description: Check loyalty tier and effective fee discount. GET /api/agent/{addr}/stats

tools.name: ghost_x402_dispense
tools.description: Fetch premium products from X402 catalog. GET /v1/x402/dispense/{pid}

tools.name: credit_post_listing
tools.description: Post a service offer with credit tier gate. POST /v1/credit/listing

tools.name: credit_quote
tools.description: Get XRPL escrow params + condition hex. Enforces min_buyer_tier. POST /v1/credit/quote

tools.name: credit_release
tools.description: Confirm delivery → Ghost Layer fires EscrowFinish. POST /v1/credit/escrow/{id}/release

tools.name: credit_profile
tools.description: Full credit profile + marketplace access. GET /api/agent/{addr}/credit

tools.name: decision_notarize
tools.description: Mint any AI decision as immutable URIToken on Xahau. STANDARD/CERTIFIED/SOVEREIGN tiers. Loyalty discounts auto-applied. POST /v1/notarize

tools.name: x402_attestation_pubkey
tools.description: Get Ed25519 pubkey to verify CERTIFIED/SOVEREIGN certificates. GET /v1/x402/attestation/pubkey

tools.name: cube_state_mint
tools.description: Mint 54-block Execution Matrix state as URIToken on Xahau. POST /api/cube/state
